## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Security Impact

Does this change affect token handling, error output, API calls, or user input processing?
If yes, describe what was considered and how it was mitigated.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated Pester tests.
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer passes on src/.
- [ ] I updated attacks.json when this change introduces or modifies attack mappings.
- [ ] I verified the change works in PowerShell 7+.
- [ ] I confirmed error messages do not leak tokens, paths, or sensitive API response data.
